name: Tf2-1_I_200000
description: Full-length Tf2 retrotransposon copy Tf2-1 on S. pombe chromosome I near position 200000. ~4.9 kb gypsy-class element with ~350 bp 5' and 3' LTRs and an internal gag-pol polyprotein ORF. Multi-maps to the other ~12 full-length Tf2 elements at >99% identity in the gag-pol region; PSV-disambiguation requires reads spanning the unique 5'/3' flanking insertion site.
